授業目的:
To improve spoken
fluency on a range of common topics, through interacting with classmates in
in-class tasks and group discussions.
到達目標:
By the end of the
course, learners will be better able to:



 

speak more fluently on
selected topics and tasks

use a range of basic
interaction strategies to communicate effectively in group work and discussion
tasks

develop interactional
competence such that participants can conduct group discussion unsupported

negotiate meaning in
order to handle breakdowns in communication

understand  and use a range of
low-frequency vocabulary itemsdevelop vocabulary and
reading fluency through regular extensive reading tasks
特記事項: 【合併】英語IIｂ　２２（経済学部）/英語IIIｂ　２２（経済学部）
授業方法:
Classes will be
interactive and group-work based, with some language and skills guidance from
the teacher. Learners are expected to participate actively in all tasks to gain
the maximum benefit to their spoken English skills. There will be a range of
spoken tasks, including group discussions, presentations, supported by
listening tasks. Flex hours tasks will be used to develop vocabulary and
self-expression skills through additional assignments. Materials will include a
selection from the textbook as well as additional materials distributed in
class and on LUNA.
